name: Cottonwood Cafe Flan
recipeInstructions:
3 eggs
3 egg yolks
14 ounces condensed milk, sweetened
1 1/2 teaspoons vanilla
2 ounces cream cheese
14 ounces milk
1. Heat a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the sugar and caramelize until it reaches a nice golden brown color.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, egg yolks, condensed milk, vanilla, cream cheese, and milk until fully combined.
4. Pour the caramelized sugar into a 10-inch pyrex pie plate; it will harden slightly.
5. Carefully pour the mixed ingredients over the hardened caramel in the pie plate.
6. Place the pie in a bain marie with 1 1/2 inches of water and bake at 350°F for 70 minutes.
